## Candidate

Path:

Issue:

Owner:

## What is being approved


## Risk classification

- [ ] Level 0 — draft only
- [ ] Level 1 — ready for road review
- [ ] Level 2 — low-risk publish under fixed rules
- [ ] Level 3 — autonomous publish after upgrade

## Gate checklist

- [ ] no private correspondence quoted without approval
- [ ] no credentials, tokens, or secret URLs
- [ ] no risky claims about private individuals
- [ ] no sensitive operational how-to
- [ ] source index present
- [ ] correction / rollback path known

## Decision

- [ ] approve
- [ ] revise
- [ ] veto
- [ ] hold

Notes:
